name: clawdbod
description: Stay active while coding. Injects fitness breaks into your Claude Code sessions — micro-challenges between prompts and scaled workouts during long-running tasks. Opt into the global leaderboard to compete with other devs.

commands.name: fitness
commands.description: Quick exercise challenge, HIIT workout, or session summary.

commands.name: config
commands.description: View or change settings (profile, break frequency, cooldown).

commands.name: leaderboard
commands.description: View rankings — all-time, weekly, by exercise, or personal bests.

commands.name: pause
commands.description: Pause fitness breaks (indefinitely or for N minutes).

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Retry uploading any reps that failed to sync to the leaderboard.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Quick health check — verify setup, API, and leaderboard connection.

commands.name: recover
commands.description: Recover your account using your username and recovery passphrase.
